info.title: BetterMQ API
info.description: HTTP webhook broker — publish, queues, enqueue, flow control, cron, and DLQ. Authenticate with a panel-generated `sk_local_…` Bearer token.

max_retries.description: Retry attempts after the first failure. 0 = no retries (single delivery attempt).
Retry attempts after the first failure. 0 = no retries (single delivery attempt).

get.description: Axum matches `{*destination}` — multi-segment URL-encoded paths are supported.

post.summary: Enqueue by queue name or id

get.summary: Flow control state for a grouping key

put.summary: Upsert flow profile and create lane

parameters.name: dlq_topic
parameters.description: Full DLQ topic (`__direct.__dlq`, `__group.{id}.{member}.__dlq`, …). Use when not a named queue.

get.summary: List DLQ buckets (queues, direct publish, group members)

post.summary: Stateless gateway batch ingest (forwards to shard leaders)
Fan-out publish to all active members
